owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Tray smoke now verifies both the empty baseline and the ready-state tray JSON playbook path; the next bounded owner-facing gap is surfacing that same path in the tray next-steps brief only when the owner-test contract is truly ready.

chunks.title: Surface tray brief playbook path
chunks.goal: Surface owner_test_playbook_path in the tray next-steps brief when the monthly reactive owner-test contract is genuinely ready, while keeping non-ready states silent.
acceptance: The tray next-steps brief includes docs/MONTHLY_REACTIVE_OWNER_TEST_PLAYBOOK.md when owner_test_playbook_path is ready.
The brief stays silent about the playbook path in the non-ready baseline state.
The brief reuses the existing owner_test_playbook_path contract instead of duplicating owner-test instructions into a second source of truth.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after tray brief playbook path
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after the tray next-steps brief surfaces owner_test_playbook_path in ready state.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped tray brief owner_test_playbook_path surface.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the tray-brief playbook-path chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
